column8: Your brother is much____________(tall) than me.
column9: This island used to be much___________(green) before the forest fires.
column10: Slow down! You're___________(fit) than me and I can't keep up!

column12: It's actually____________(trendy) to wear your hair up this year.
column13: As the time for the performance got nearer, I got_____________(nervous).
column14: Old people are often__________(wise) than young people.
column15: Why don't you try and find a___________(cheap) computer game and save some money?
column16: Matt seems to have got even________(lazy) than he used to be and almost never studies.
column17: If the problem gets any________(serious), we may need to inform the manager about it.
column18: If you work__________(quickly), you'll finish sooner and then you can go home earlier.
column19: Ben says he's feeling much__________(well) after his illness.
